relabelled_senses.definition: A friendly greeting equivalent to 'good morning,' originally wishing someone the best part of the morning.

literal: no literal meaning
To kill oneself; to commit suicide.
To reach the highest position on a ranked list of popular recordings, songs, or other ranked media (e.g., music charts, streaming charts, app-store charts).
Angry, irritated, or upset; annoyed to the point of hostility.
Used to introduce an additional, often more significant, fact or example that reinforces or amplifies the preceding statement.
An expression used to indicate that a description is an understatement and that the reality is more extreme or significant than stated.
A situation in which the outcome is uncertain and two or more alternatives appear equally likely; a close contest.
Extremely; to the utmost degree, often describing emotional or physical effect (e.g., deeply moved or chilled).
Until one or more participants are killed; continuing a contest, fight, or struggle until death occurs.
Completely filled, full, or saturated to capacity (commonly used of people who have eaten or of containers).

relabelled_senses.definition: Exactly in accordance with the precise wording of instructions, rules, or written text; without deviation.

literal: no literal meaning
To the greatest possible extent; as much as possible; extremely.
A figurative expression denoting a very large distance or quantity; used hyperbolically.
Concise and directly relevant; expressed without unnecessary detail.
To make brief contact with someone in order to update, check on, or coordinate matters.
To apply a small amount of makeup or cosmetic product in order to freshen or restore one's appearance.
An expression uttered while physically touching wood (or metaphorically invoking the action) to ward off bad luck or to express a hope that a favorable situation will continue.
Characterized by or given to excessive sentimentality, emotional expression, or subjective concern with feelings rather than facts.
Extremely tough, hardy, or durable; able to withstand hardship, difficulty, or physical strain.
An unfortunate event, setback, or instance of bad luck that causes disappointment or hardship.
